name: @day8/re-frame2-improver
description: Critique-mode for existing re-frame2 ClojureScript code. Reviews a body of source files against an anti-pattern catalogue, surfaces concrete findings cross-linked to canonical idioms, and may propose inline fixes. Activates only on explicit pull — vocabulary alone is not enough; a body of re-frame2 source must be in scope.
author: day8 (https://github.com/day8)
